name: pai-econ-codex
description: Codex plugin packaging the pAI-Econ-codex theoretical economics research skill.

interface.shortDescription: Theoretical economics modeling workflow for Codex.
interface.longDescription: pAI-Econ-codex packages a human-in-the-loop theoretical economics pipeline for transforming empirical puzzles and mechanism intuitions into model matches, primitives, assumptions, propositions, proof sketches, counterexamples, and manuscript scaffolds. It is a Codex adaptation of maxwell2732/pAI-Econ-claude, with upstream intellectual attribution preserved.
defaultPrompt: Use $pai-econ-codex to refine my economics puzzle.
Use $pai-econ-codex to audit my theoretical model.
Use $pai-econ-codex to build a manuscript scaffold.
